entity.label: Regem-melech
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Friend of the king, one of the two messengers sent by the exiled Jews to Jerusalem in the time of Darius (Zech. 7:2) to make inquiries at the temple.

nodes.label: Regem-melech
nodes.description: Friend of the king, one of the two messengers sent by the exiled Jews to Jerusalem in the time of Darius (Zech. 7:2) to make inquiries at the temple.

verses.text: When they had sent unto the house of God Sherezer and Regemmelech, and their men, to pray before the LORD,
